bio: Passionate about crafting clean, beautiful, and responsive web experiences. I turn ideas into elegant interfaces, one pixel at a time.

bioParagraphs: Hey there! I'm Muskan Zahid Ali Khaskheli, a self-driven Frontend Developer who genuinely loves the art of clean, purposeful design. To me, the web shouldn't just be functional it should feel beautiful, intuitive, and work flawlessly for absolutely everyone who interacts with it.
From pixel-perfect layouts to smooth interactions, I focus on every detail to build experiences that leave a lasting impression. Always learning, always improving.

infoCards.label: Education
infoCards.value: BSIT Student at SAU Tandojam & Self-taught Frontend Developer

infoCards.label: Career Goal
infoCards.value: To evolve my frontend expertise into full-stack development, building powerful, end-to-end web applications.

infoCards.label: Interests
infoCards.value: UI Design, Web Animation, Open Source
